records.question: Which departments located in the Chandler building have a budget at most 255041.46 and include a student named Okaf?
records.gold_sql:

JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Okaf' AND department.building = 'Chandler' AND department.budget <= 255041.46

records.question: Which departments have related courses, instructors, and students, where at least one of those students has exactly 40 total credits?

SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.tot_cred = 40
